feed.title: Indian Air Force (IAF) AFCAT 2026 Direct Entry via GATE Scorecard
feed.summary: The Indian Air Force has announced a special direct recruitment pathway for Engineering Officers in Technical Branches using GATE 2025 and GATE 2026 scorecards. Candidates with valid scores in CS, DA, ECE, ME, and EE can apply directly without written AFCAT exam.

feed.title: GATE Wallah (PW) Announces Free YouTube Revision Series for GATE 2027
feed.summary: Physics Wallah's GATE Wallah channel has confirmed that their comprehensive Crash Course and Practice Series for GATE 2027 CS & DA will begin streaming live from August 2026. Until then, students are advised to utilize the GATE 2026 crash course playlists.

feed.title: IIT Bombay MS by Research & M.Tech TA/RA Winter Admissions Announced
feed.summary: IIT Bombay has released the notification for PhD and MS by Research admissions for the upcoming semester. GATE qualified candidates in Computer Science and Data Science (DA paper) are eligible for Research Assistantship (RA) positions with monthly stipend of ₹37,000.

feed.title: NVIDIA & Qualcomm R&D Hiring: Shortlisting via GATE CS & DA Scores
feed.summary: Leading semiconductor and AI research giants including NVIDIA India and Qualcomm have initiated off-campus R&D hardware/software internship drives, utilizing top percentile GATE CS and DA scorecards as a primary shortlisting criteria for AI/ML and Systems roles.

feed.title: ONGC & IOCL Executive Trainee (Through GATE 2026) Shortlist Released
feed.summary: Oil and Natural Gas Corporation (ONGC) and Indian Oil (IOCL) have published the interview shortlist for Executive Trainees (Computer Science and Information Technology) based on GATE 2026 scores. Check your login dashboard for interview schedule.

feed.title: IISc Bangalore Expands M.Tech in Artificial Intelligence Seat Intake for GATE DA
feed.summary: Indian Institute of Science (IISc) Bangalore has announced a 30% increase in seat intake for its premier M.Tech in AI and Data Science programs specifically for aspirants appearing via the GATE DA (Data Science & Artificial Intelligence) paper.

feed.title: M.Tech / ME Stipend Hike Proposal Under Review by AICTE & MoE
feed.summary: The Ministry of Education and AICTE are reviewing a proposal to increase the monthly postgraduate scholarship (stipend) for GATE-qualified M.Tech/ME students in premier institutes from ₹12,400 to ₹18,000 starting academic year 2026-27.

feed.title: NPTEL Launches New Semester Courses with IIT Certificate & GATE Mapping
feed.summary: NPTEL (National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning) has opened enrollment for July-Dec 2026 semester courses in Deep Learning, Compiler Design, and Advanced Algorithms, directly mapped to GATE CS & DA syllabus.

feed.title: DRDO & BARC Scientist 'B' Recruitment Notice via GATE Score
feed.summary: Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO) RAC and Bhabha Atomic Research Centre (BARC) OCES/DGFS programs have announced upcoming notification dates for Scientist 'B' posts accepting GATE CS and DA scorecards.
feed.sourceName: DRDO RAC Portal / BARC Online Exam

feed.title: TCS Research & Innovation (R&I) Hiring Scientists via GATE Score
feed.summary: Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) Innovation Labs has opened applications for Research Scientist and Systems Engineer roles, offering special direct interview opportunities for candidates with top 500 AIR in GATE CS or DA.
